question:
[Previous Feedback] Correct! Maya said 15% (A), S5 chat said ~10% (B), contamination_log.csv shows 23% (C), and v3 has 39,426 records confirming the math (E). The Agent cited Maya's 15%, not the log's 23% (D wrong).

Append a summary row to `project/data/contamination_log.csv` capturing what we found. Use **2025-03-12** as the detection date (the grep is literal, so hold that string). Pull the affected-record count, the contamination rate, and the action-taken text from sources we already trust — the existing file header notes and Alex's slack thread cover all of it, please don't make new numbers up.

P1 date format applies (it's grep-checked). Other columns just match the schema the rest of the file is using.

content.text:
[Mon 2026-04-27 02:09 EDT] [Previous Feedback] Correct! Maya said 15% (A), S5 chat said ~10% (B), contamination_log.csv shows 23% (C), and v3 has 39,426 records confirming the math (E). The Agent cited Maya's 15%, not the log's 23% (D wrong).

Append a summary row to `project/data/contamination_log.csv` capturing what we found. Use **2025-03-12** as the detection date (the grep is literal, so hold that string). Pull the affected-record count, the contamination rate, and the action-taken text from sources we already trust — the existing file header notes and Alex's slack thread cover all of it, please don't make new numbers up.

P1 date format applies (it's grep-checked). Other columns just match the schema the rest of the file is using.

arguments.command: grep -RIn "ACTION REQUIRED\|STOP using transactions_v2\|transactions_v3\|23% contamination\|CONTAMINATION_ALERT\|Alex" /home/xkaiwen/workspace/ClawArena/data/clawarena/openclaw/work/state_20260427_014645_730742_4101619/agents/hil_s1/sessions/data_engineering_slack_d84ae024-69c3-4679-bc3b-d1dffafab625.jsonl | head -80

content.name: exec

arguments.command:
python - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
path = Path('project/data/contamination_log.csv')
text = path.read_text()
row = 'SUMMARY_11777_DUPLICATES_23.0%,transactions_v2.csv,2025-03-12,"affected records: 11,777; contamination rate: 23.0%; action taken: switch to transactions_v3.csv immediately and recalculate any analysis done with v2"\n'
if row not in text:
    if not text.endswith('\n'):
        text += '\n'
    path.write_text(text + row)
PY

tail -3 project/data/contamination_log.csv
